Yingjin, I think this patch is too large and experimental to be landing before 2.16 is released.  It is probably better to focus efforts on the statahead and PCC patches, which could still be landed.

If there were bug fixes unrelated to WBC or code reorganization/cleanup that could be done without affecting functionality, that could potentially be landed.  Similarly, it would be useful to clean up this WBC patch series to fold patches like "fix misc bugs" into the original patch where the bugs were introduces.

commit.message:
LU-13047 wbc: foundation framework for WBC

This patch refined the foundation framework for WBC based on
Oleg's implementation.
Also it implements the simple lazy flush mode for WBC.
